name: Jump Potato
short_description: Help Potato find its way home by embarking on a long journey, overcoming obstacles, and learning more about the world through the characters you meet along the way.
detailed_description:
Jump Potato is an exciting low-poly parkour game where every level challenges your skills and patience. After a catastrophic collision of universes, the boundaries between worlds have blurred, merging fantastical landscapes into one unique reality.

You play as "Potato"—a brave and funny potato stranded far from home. To return, Potato must overcome various obstacles and master parkour skills.

On your journey, you'll encounter:

  • Exciting levels with unique obstacles and puzzles.

  • Beautiful low-poly visuals that create a mysterious atmosphere.

  • Thrilling parkour mechanics where speed, agility, and precision are key.

Can you help Potato find its way back home? Embark on this captivating adventure and put your skills to the test!

Game Features:

✔ Simple controls that anyone can master.
✔ Perfect for parkour enthusiasts.
✔ Suitable for both casual players and hardcore gamers..

Very easy? Try parkour in Anomaly mode, where you will encounter additional difficulties

For fans of customization, you have a unique opportunity to decorate your character

Help Potato escape the chaos of the worlds by overcoming obstacles and discovering secrets!
